subject: Cannot join Zoom meeting — generic connection error
description: Clicking meeting link shows error before video starts; browser join also fails.

ts_steps.title: Corporate vs hotspot
ts_steps.action: Mobile hotspot test if policy allows — isolates firewall.

ts_steps.title: Full reinstall
ts_steps.action: Uninstall; download MSI from zoom.us; install; reboot.

ts_steps.title: Firewall allowlist
ts_steps.action: IT adds Zoom domains and UDP ranges per Zoom doc.

ts_steps.title: SSL inspection
ts_steps.action: If TLS break, exempt Zoom or split inspection.

ts_steps.title: Collect logs
ts_steps.action: Zoom Help → troubleshooting log path for ticket.

internal_information: Firewall, proxy, SSL break, old client. Hotspot comparison decisive.
